msg: warning: Variable buf is used uninitialized!
reasoning: Same file (eef2317b9f5.c) and same bug as FAMILY_76, now reporting line 31 ('free(buf)') as the uninitialized use. When the goto path is taken (cmd==8 skips malloc), buf is uninitialized and free(buf) attempts to free an indeterminate pointer — undefined behavior. The vbdb marks line 31 with '//ERROR'. Presence condition def(CONFIG_FEATURE_CLEAN_UP) is correctly constrained. Known bug.
